test-case.description: parses wrapped {instances:[...]} format and returns running instance
test-case.name: READ: ConvertFrom-VastaiInstances.parses wrapped {instances:[...]} format and returns running instance

test-case.description: parses bare [{...}] array format
test-case.name: READ: ConvertFrom-VastaiInstances.parses bare [{...}] array format

test-case.description: handles empty instances list without errors
test-case.name: READ: ConvertFrom-VastaiInstances.handles empty instances list without errors

test-case.description: correctly classifies all three statuses in a mixed list
test-case.name: READ: ConvertFrom-VastaiInstances.correctly classifies all three statuses in a mixed list

test-case.description: classifies 'loading' as neither running nor stopped
test-case.name: READ: ConvertFrom-VastaiInstances.classifies 'loading' as neither running nor stopped

test-case.description: returns null on malformed JSON without throwing
test-case.name: READ: ConvertFrom-VastaiInstances.returns null on malformed JSON without throwing

test-case.description: returns null on empty string without throwing
test-case.name: READ: ConvertFrom-VastaiInstances.returns null on empty string without throwing

test-case.description: returns null on whitespace-only string without throwing
test-case.name: READ: ConvertFrom-VastaiInstances.returns null on whitespace-only string without throwing

test-case.description: preserves the instance ID field exactly (no float rounding)
test-case.name: READ: ConvertFrom-VastaiInstances.preserves the instance ID field exactly (no float rounding)

test-case.description: rejects offers with VRAM below minimum
test-case.name: CREATE: Select-VastaiOffer.rejects offers with VRAM below minimum

test-case.description: rejects offers above the price ceiling
test-case.name: CREATE: Select-VastaiOffer.rejects offers above the price ceiling

test-case.description: rejects offers from CN (data-sovereignty blocklist)
test-case.name: CREATE: Select-VastaiOffer.rejects offers from CN (data-sovereignty blocklist)

test-case.description: rejects offers from RU (sanctions blocklist)
test-case.name: CREATE: Select-VastaiOffer.rejects offers from RU (sanctions blocklist)

test-case.description: selects the cheapest qualifying offer, not just the first
test-case.name: CREATE: Select-VastaiOffer.selects the cheapest qualifying offer, not just the first

test-case.description: returns null when no offer meets all criteria
test-case.name: CREATE: Select-VastaiOffer.returns null when no offer meets all criteria

test-case.description: returns null on empty offers array
test-case.name: CREATE: Select-VastaiOffer.returns null on empty offers array

test-case.description: handles offers with no geolocation field without throwing
test-case.name: CREATE: Select-VastaiOffer.handles offers with no geolocation field without throwing

test-case.description: allows offers from non-blocked countries
test-case.name: CREATE: Select-VastaiOffer.allows offers from non-blocked countries

test-case.description: returns null when well within all limits
test-case.name: WATCH: Test-WatcherShouldStop.returns null when well within all limits

test-case.description: stops when idle threshold is exactly reached
test-case.name: WATCH: Test-WatcherShouldStop.stops when idle threshold is exactly reached

test-case.description: does NOT stop when idle is one second below threshold
test-case.name: WATCH: Test-WatcherShouldStop.does NOT stop when idle is one second below threshold

test-case.description: stops when session cap is exactly reached
test-case.name: WATCH: Test-WatcherShouldStop.stops when session cap is exactly reached

test-case.description: does NOT stop when session elapsed is one second below cap
test-case.name: WATCH: Test-WatcherShouldStop.does NOT stop when session elapsed is one second below cap

test-case.description: stops when spend cap is exactly reached
test-case.name: WATCH: Test-WatcherShouldStop.stops when spend cap is exactly reached

test-case.description: does NOT stop when spend is one cent below cap
test-case.name: WATCH: Test-WatcherShouldStop.does NOT stop when spend is one cent below cap

test-case.description: suppresses idle stop when batch has Ready tasks
test-case.name: WATCH: Test-WatcherShouldStop.suppresses idle stop when batch has Ready tasks

test-case.description: suppresses idle stop when batch has In Progress tasks
test-case.name: WATCH: Test-WatcherShouldStop.suppresses idle stop when batch has In Progress tasks

test-case.description: hard-stops when batch is DONE with nothing pending
test-case.name: WATCH: Test-WatcherShouldStop.hard-stops when batch is DONE with nothing pending

test-case.description: does NOT hard-stop when batch is DONE but a task is still In Progress
test-case.name: WATCH: Test-WatcherShouldStop.does NOT hard-stop when batch is DONE but a task is still In Progress

test-case.description: session cap fires even when batch has pending work (hard cap, not suppressible)
test-case.name: WATCH: Test-WatcherShouldStop.session cap fires even when batch has pending work (hard cap, not suppressible)

test-case.description: spend cap fires even when batch has pending work (hard cap, not suppressible)
test-case.name: WATCH: Test-WatcherShouldStop.spend cap fires even when batch has pending work (hard cap, not suppressible)

test-case.description: behaves as non-batch-aware when BatchReadyCount and BatchInProgressCount are -1
test-case.name: WATCH: Test-WatcherShouldStop.behaves as non-batch-aware when BatchReadyCount and BatchInProgressCount are -1

test-case.description: reads ACTIVE status from active fixture
test-case.name: BATCH: Get-BatchFileState.reads ACTIVE status from active fixture

test-case.description: counts Ready tasks correctly in active batch
test-case.name: BATCH: Get-BatchFileState.counts Ready tasks correctly in active batch

test-case.description: identifies In Progress tasks in active batch
test-case.name: BATCH: Get-BatchFileState.identifies In Progress tasks in active batch

test-case.description: reports DONE status from done fixture
test-case.name: BATCH: Get-BatchFileState.reports DONE status from done fixture

test-case.description: reports zero In Progress tasks in done batch
test-case.name: BATCH: Get-BatchFileState.reports zero In Progress tasks in done batch

test-case.description: throws on missing status frontmatter comment
test-case.name: BATCH: Get-BatchFileState.throws on missing status frontmatter comment

test-case.description: throws when batch file does not exist
test-case.name: BATCH: Get-BatchFileState.throws when batch file does not exist

test-case.description: returns the correct file path in the result
test-case.name: BATCH: Get-BatchFileState.returns the correct file path in the result

test-case.description: returns the running instance when it is running on first poll
test-case.name: UPDATE: Wait-ForRunning.returns the running instance when it is running on first poll

test-case.description: returns null immediately when TimeoutMinutes is 0 (deadline already past)
test-case.name: UPDATE: Wait-ForRunning.returns null immediately when TimeoutMinutes is 0 (deadline already past)

test-case.description: returns null when instance ID is not present in the response
test-case.name: UPDATE: Wait-ForRunning.returns null when instance ID is not present in the response

test-case.description: returns null when vastai returns empty instance list
test-case.name: UPDATE: Wait-ForRunning.returns null when vastai returns empty instance list

test-case.description: returns null when vastai returns malformed JSON
test-case.name: UPDATE: Wait-ForRunning.returns null when vastai returns malformed JSON

test-case.description: returns parsed instance data when vastai returns valid JSON
test-case.name: READ: Get-DevServerInstances.returns parsed instance data when vastai returns valid JSON

test-case.description: returns null when vastai returns an error string instead of JSON
test-case.name: READ: Get-DevServerInstances.returns null when vastai returns an error string instead of JSON

test-case.description: returns 'idle' when models array is empty
test-case.name: OLLAMA: Get-OllamaStatus.returns 'idle' when models array is empty

test-case.description: returns 'idle' when models property is null
test-case.name: OLLAMA: Get-OllamaStatus.returns 'idle' when models property is null

test-case.description: returns 'busy:modelname' when a model is loaded
test-case.name: OLLAMA: Get-OllamaStatus.returns 'busy:modelname' when a model is loaded

test-case.description: returns 'busy:' with comma-separated names when multiple models loaded
test-case.name: OLLAMA: Get-OllamaStatus.returns 'busy:' with comma-separated names when multiple models loaded

test-case.description: returns 'unreachable' when Invoke-RestMethod throws (tunnel down)
test-case.name: OLLAMA: Get-OllamaStatus.returns 'unreachable' when Invoke-RestMethod throws (tunnel down)

test-case.description: returns 'unreachable' on timeout (not 'idle' -- unknown is not idle)
test-case.name: OLLAMA: Get-OllamaStatus.returns 'unreachable' on timeout (not 'idle' -- unknown is not idle)
